title: Knowledge Rules
description: Schema for the active knowledge base rules file (.forge/knowledge/rules.json). Rules are learned from review findings, convention violations, and security patterns.

category.description: Finding category this rule relates to (from category-registry.json)

detection_pattern.description: Regex or natural-language pattern to detect the issue

detection_type.description: regex = L1 check engine eligible; semantic = requires agent review

recommended_fix.description: Concrete action to resolve the detected issue

applicable_contexts.description: Domain areas where the rule applies (from domain-detection.md)

applicable_languages.description: Languages this rule applies to. Empty array = all languages.

source_agent.description: Agent that originally created the rule

source_finding.description: Finding ID that triggered this rule (e.g., SEC-AUTH-001-abc123)

severity_default.description: Default severity when the rule triggers

confidence.description: Rule reliability — tracks via lifecycle promotion

last_applied.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last successful application

application_count.description: Times this rule has been applied. Minimum 3 for meaningful effectiveness scoring.

false_positive_count.description: Times this rule triggered but was irrelevant

effectiveness_score.description: application_count / (application_count + false_positive_count). Only meaningful when application_count >= 3.

promoted_from.description: Filename of the inbox item that created this rule

source.description: learned-rule = from review finding+fix pair; manual = user-authored; auto-discovered = from memory discovery
